title: Jessie Buckley Wins Best Actress Oscar for Hamnet
text: Jessie Buckley claimed the Academy Award for Best Actress at the 2026 Oscars ceremony, earning recognition for her performance in Hamnet. She defeated competitors Rose Byrne, Kate Hudson, Renate Reinsve, and Emma Stone. Upon accepting her award, an emotional Buckley expressed gratitude to her fellow nominees and loved ones. She dedicated the honor to the beautiful chaos of a mother's heart, noting the significance of receiving this recognition on Mother's Day in the United Kingdom. Backstage, Buckley elaborated on the emotional weight of her victory, stating it feels like some kind of crazy alchemy that all of these things are colliding. This Oscar victory marked the culmination of Buckley's awards season success. She had previously secured a SAG Award, BAFTA, and Golden Globe for the role in director Chloé Zhao's film about Agnes and William Shakespeare.
